languages.text: "Забавно, когда ты обрек Нунциуса на мучения, ты этим вопросом не задавался".
"Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."
languages.original_text: "Забавно, когда ты обрек Нунциуса на мучения, ты этим вопросом не задавался".

traits.locale_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."
"Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."
"Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

languages.text: «Es curioso, no se preguntó eso mismo cuando condenó a Nuncius a tortura».
languages.original_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

traits.locale_text: «Es curioso, no se preguntó eso mismo cuando condenó a Nuncius a tortura».

languages.text: “真可笑，当初你把努恩修斯推向苦海时，怎么没问自己这个问题。”
languages.original_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

traits.locale_text: “真可笑，当初你把努恩修斯推向苦海时，怎么没问自己这个问题。”

languages.text: « C'est drôle, cette question si importante ne s'est visiblement pas posée lorsque vous avez condamné Nuncius à ce tourment sans fin. »
languages.original_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

traits.locale_text: « C'est drôle, cette question si importante ne s'est visiblement pas posée lorsque vous avez condamné Nuncius à ce tourment sans fin. »

languages.text: "Ne komik... Nuncius'u işkenceye mahkûm ederken kendine bu soruyu sormamıştın."
languages.original_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

traits.locale_text: "Ne komik... Nuncius'u işkenceye mahkûm ederken kendine bu soruyu sormamıştın."

languages.text: "Witzig, dass Ihr Euch diese Frage nicht gestellt habt, als Ihr Nuncius zu ewiger Folter verdammt habt."
languages.original_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

traits.locale_text: "Witzig, dass Ihr Euch diese Frage nicht gestellt habt, als Ihr Nuncius zu ewiger Folter verdammt habt."

languages.text: 「面白いことに、ヌンキウスに苦役を宣告したとき、あなたはその質問を自分にしなかった。」
languages.original_text: "Funny, you failed to ask yourself that question when you condemned Nuncius to torment."

traits.locale_text: 「面白いことに、ヌンキウスに苦役を宣告したとき、あなたはその質問を自分にしなかった。」
